title: Zero Glycemic Impact
description: Leavia has a glycemic index of 0, making it completely safe for diabetics and those managing blood sugar levels. Unlike regular sugar (GI: 65), Leavia won't spike your blood glucose.

title: Zero Calories
description: Enjoy the full sweetness of sugar without a single calorie. Perfect for weight management, Leavia lets you indulge your sweet cravings guilt-free, every single day.

title: Tooth-Friendly
description: Unlike conventional sugar, Leavia doesn't feed oral bacteria that cause cavities. Dentists recommend it as a safer alternative for maintaining excellent dental health.

title: Gut Microbiome Support
description: Enriched with prebiotic inulin, Leavia actively nourishes beneficial gut bacteria. A healthy gut microbiome is fundamental to immunity, mood, and overall wellbeing.

title: Antioxidant Rich
description: Stevia leaf extract is naturally rich in antioxidant compounds with anti-inflammatory properties. Leavia doesn't just sweeten; it actively supports cellular health.

title: 100% Plant-Based
description: Every ingredient in Leavia is derived from nature. Vegan, keto-friendly, paleo-approved, and free from artificial sweeteners, colors, preservatives, and GMOs.
